mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_skill_validation_result (run_id, test_case_id, answer_text, hit_chunks, score, is_pass, fail_reason) VALUES
(#{item.runId}, #{item.testCaseId}, #{item.answerText}, #{item.hitChunks}, #{item.score}, #{item.isPass}, #{item.failReason})
mapper.select: SELECT rst.id, rst.test_case_id, tc.question_text, rst.answer_text, rst.hit_chunks, rst.score, rst.is_pass, rst.fail_reason FROM ai_skill_validation_result rst LEFT JOIN ai_skill_test_case tc ON tc.id = rst.test_case_id WHERE rst.run_id=#{runId} ORDER BY rst.id ASC
